segments.text: Yeah, went for the edgeguard but he's ready for the jab lock
segments.original_text: はい、崖上がりを攻めたけど、弱3段しっかり見ている

segments.text: And that's the Grabbing Scratch for the stock!
segments.original_text: さあここはもう一度グラビングスクラッチで撃墜

full_text: Yeah, went for the edgeguard but he's ready for the jab lock Mashing out with the fair And that's the Grabbing Scratch for the stock!

corrections.original: 火上がりを進めたけど、ジャック3弾しっかり見ている
corrections.corrected: 崖上がりを攻めたけど、弱3段しっかり見ている
corrections.rule: smash terms (崖上がり, 弱3段)
